citation.description: UiConfig dataclass (line 395-399), ui field on Config (line 465), 'ui': UiConfig in _SECTION_CLASSES (line 492), 'ui': {'enabled': lambda...} in _SECTIONS (lines 543-545). Re-export in config.py line 40. Tests in tests/unit/test_audit_serve.py lines 82-113.

criteria.criterion: `[ui] enabled` round-trips through config via `rebar.toml`, `REBAR_UI_ENABLED`, and `-c ui.enabled=...`, each yielding `Config.ui.enabled == True`, and is NOT reported as an unknown key.

citation.description: Checks load_config().ui.enabled and emits message naming 'ui.enabled' and '[ui] enabled'. Tests: test_serve_disabled_refuses_and_names_flag and test_import_rebar_pulls_no_web_dependency in test_audit_serve_heldout.py.

criteria.criterion: With `[ui] enabled = false` (default), `import rebar` imports no web dependency and `rebar audit serve` refuses to start with a message that names the `[ui] enabled` flag and exits non-zero.

citation.description: try/except ModuleNotFoundError wrapping the lazy server import; outputs 'nava-rebar[ui]' message and returns 1. Test test_serve_missing_extra_is_actionable in test_audit_serve_heldout.py.

criteria.criterion: With the `ui` extra absent, `rebar audit serve` (when enabled) exits with an actionable 'install nava-rebar[ui]' message, not a traceback.

citation.description: _LOOPBACK_HOSTS frozenset (line 28) and warning when host not in it (lines 152-156). Tests test_serve_nonloopback_host_warns and test_serve_loopback_host_does_not_warn in test_audit_serve_heldout.py.

criteria.criterion: `rebar audit serve --host 0.0.0.0` prints a non-loopback exposure warning to stderr before binding; `--host 127.0.0.1` (default) does not.

citation.description: port = 8765 default (line 102), --port parsing with _parse_port, server.serve(host=host, port=port) call (line 166). Live E2E test test_serve_binds_loopback_ephemeral_and_lists_ticket in test_audit_serve_heldout.py uses ephemeral port.

criteria.criterion: `rebar audit serve --port <n>` binds the given port (default `8765`).

citation.description: _audited_tickets() enumerates rebar.list_tickets() + audit_trail(); _render_index() builds HTML; create_app() returns FastAPI app with GET / -> HTMLResponse; serve() binds via uvicorn. Tests: test_index_lists_a_ticket_with_audit_data (happy-path) and test_serve_binds_loopback_ephemeral_and_lists_ticket (live E2E).

criteria.criterion: With the feature enabled, the server binds 127.0.0.1 and serves an index page listing tickets that have audit data.

citation.description: Code is well-formed, typed, and consistent. plan-review signature reports blocking: 0 findings. All required files (pyproject.toml ui extra, _config_schema.py full wiring, config.py UiConfig re-export, server.py, _audit_commands.py serve subcommand, audit.txt help update) are present and correctly implemented.
